drafts.meaning_en: (usually in the plural) Abbreviation of milli-arcsecond.
A phonetic script or romanization system for a language spoken in the People's Republic of China.
A way or means of approaching or entering; an entrance; a passage.
A cut or notch in the margin of anything, or a recess like a notch.
A powerful and addictive drug derived from opium producing intense euphoria classed as an illegal narcotic in most of the world.
The total, aggregate or sum of material (not applicable to discrete numbers or units or items in standard English).
To make something inactive or no longer effective
A list or invoice of the passengers or goods being carried by a commercial vehicle or ship.
A reduction in price in order to stimulate sales.
Any word used as the key to a code.
The name assigned to a file in a file system.
A flag or standard used by a military commander, monarch or nation.
A term for a marijuana cigarette ('joint').
